query:
INSERT INTO landingPages (
  userId, serviceId,
  productName, productDescription,
  originalAngle, activeAngle,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001,
  'Life Coach Success Accelerator',
  'A comprehensive coaching program helping life coaches achieve consistent 5-figure months',
  '{"eyebrowHeadline":"ATTENTION LIFE COACHES","mainHeadline":"How to Get Consistent Leads and Build Consistent 5-Figure Months Using the Heart-Mind Activation Method","subheadline":"The proven blueprint that 200+ coaches have used to escape the feast-or-famine cycle forever","primaryCta":"Download The 5-Figure Coach Blueprint Free","asSeenIn":["Forbes","Inc","Entrepreneur"],"quizSection":{"question":"What is your biggest challenge right now?","options":["Getting consistent leads","Converting leads to clients","Pricing my services","Staying motivated"],"answer":"Getting consistent leads"},"problemAgitation":"If you are a life coach struggling to get consistent leads, you are not alone. Most coaches spend years posting on social media, attending networking events, and hoping for referrals — only to end up with an inconsistent income and a half-empty calendar.","solutionIntro":"The Heart-Mind Activation Method changes everything. It is a 3-phase framework that aligns your authentic message with proven direct-response marketing to attract premium clients consistently.","whyOldFail":"Generic marketing advice does not work for coaches because it ignores the unique trust-based nature of the coaching relationship.","uniqueMechanism":"The Heart-Mind Activation Method works by first activating your authentic message (Heart Phase), then building a systematic lead generation engine (Mind Phase), and finally automating client attraction (Activation Phase).","testimonials":[{"headline":"From 2 clients to fully booked in 90 days","quote":"I went from struggling to find clients to having a waitlist using this exact blueprint.","name":"Sarah K.","location":"Austin, TX"},{"headline":"First 5-figure month after 3 years of trying","quote":"Nothing else worked until I discovered the Heart-Mind Activation Method.","name":"James M.","location":"London, UK"}],"insiderAdvantages":"You get the exact templates, scripts, and systems that top coaches use to generate consistent leads without paid ads.","scarcityUrgency":"Only 20 spots available for the next cohort starting April 1st.","shockingStat":"87% of life coaches quit within 3 years due to inconsistent income — but coaches using this method report consistent 5-figure months within 90 days.","timeSavingBenefit":"Spend less than 2 hours per week on marketing while your lead generation runs on autopilot.","consultationOutline":[{"title":"Discovery Call","description":"We map out your current situation and identify the fastest path to consistent leads"},{"title":"Blueprint Session","description":"We build your custom Heart-Mind Activation plan"},{"title":"Implementation","description":"We execute the system together with weekly accountability"}]}',
  'original',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
